schemes.name: Green City Clean Energy Subsidy
schemes.description: Provides financial support of up to 50% for citizens installing solar panels, rainwater harvesting systems, or composting units at their residential properties.
documents: Proof of Property Ownership (Property Tax Receipt)
Income Certificate (Latest tax filings or pay stubs)
Installation Quote/Estimate from an approved vendor
schemes.simpleLanguage: Get half your money back from the government when you install home solar or rainwater systems. You must own your home and earn under $120,000/year.

schemes.name: Universal Senior Citizens Healthcare Support
schemes.description: A comprehensive medical insurance scheme offering cashless medical treatment up to $5,000 annually at all government and empanelled private hospitals.
documents: Proof of Residency (Utility Bill or Rent Agreement)
schemes.simpleLanguage: Free healthcare insurance up to $5,000 every year for seniors aged 60 and older. Works at all government and partner hospitals. No income limit.

schemes.name: Empower Youth Digital Literacy Grant
schemes.description: A skill development initiative providing free coding bootcamps, digital marketing training, and a one-time stipend of $300 for purchasing learning devices.
documents: Educational Certificates (High school diploma or equivalent)
schemes.simpleLanguage: Free programming or digital marketing courses, plus $300 for a laptop, for young adults aged 18-30 earning under $50,000/year.

schemes.name: Inclusive Public Housing Rental Aid
schemes.description: Rental assistance program providing monthly subsidies of up to $250 directly to landlords of low-income families to ensure safe housing.
documents: Proof of Low Income (Government assistance proof or bank statements)
Proof of Identity for all family members
schemes.simpleLanguage: Monthly housing assistance of up to $250 paid directly to your landlord if your household earns less than $35,000/year.

complaints.title: Severe Pothole on Maple Avenue
complaints.description: A deep pothole has formed in the middle of Maple Avenue, near intersection 4th Street. Multiple cars damaged tires today. Requires urgent patching.

complaints.title: Flickering Streetlight - Danger at Night
complaints.description: Streetlight #87-B is completely dead/flickering. The block is extremely dark at night, causing safety concerns for walking pedestrians.

complaints.title: EMERGENCY: Exposed Main Electrical Cable
complaints.description: An underground power conduit has cracked, and a heavy electrical wire is lying exposed on the sidewalk near the playground. Rain is forecast.

updates.message: Urgent complaint logged. Triggered automatic severity escalation.
Utility dispatch team notified for emergency isolation.
